title: Architecture
description: Find simpler module seams, naming fixes, god-object splits, and deep-module opportunities. Use when architecture, package boundaries, cohesion, or codebase shape is the problem.
body: Prefer boring depth over elaborate diagrams. A useful architecture change reduces reasons to change, shrinks public interfaces, or concentrates product behavior behind a stable seam. New abstractions need at least two real callers or a source-backed provider/runtime boundary.
